title: Tryied
lyrics: Hopefully you can hear. I have no idea. I can only hear myself, so. Lots of people would say that, you know? Oh yeah, you're looking so good to me. As, as you walk by Hey, what do you see? As you walk by your life inside of your history in front of you Sorry it worked out this way that you had to run I'm sorry that you can't forgive me from the number Get down in the whole years of my life Now you're thinking there's nothing there But just hype cause I didn't hold it down in a way But you miss me when you get far away A whole congruency that's circled around The imperfect truth of We're in love It feels like heaven when you touch me We're in love It feels like heaven when you, when you touch me It's different degree of all the things that we see In front of life a certainty Man, my girl's calling out the other line My love with music is gonna get my line Shut down for real What do you feel? When you look at me like you're not trying to heal Yeah, what do you feel? When I say you're my heaven and you close the door And don't purgatory My lesson is clear that it's needed I hope that you don't come conceited On the surface cause life like many levels And I'm just all so nervous Cause I'm in front of my own world In the back it's just me I'm just sitting next to you cooperating Loving every moment that you walk by When the thing, when it bounces I tell you, you can get past my defenses And what do you see then? It's just somebody that you're hating Yeah, and that I'm telling you You were my safeness You were my greatness All of the dreams that we took back and see Now you can't tell me anything But just cooperate and see Or lies or nothing or above Now you don't even block me I'm just ignored And it was like heaven It was like so like fucking heaven That was so stupid Ah, I totally went on a different way than I was before Before it was like totally about the moment But then as so is congruent occupancy of most things in life You almost died but you were caught Did you see that? Did you see this? Oh no, I didn't pause, don't pause That's how cool I am You're gonna see back on that man, I caught you I caught you dog But what do you mean? What do you mean he's the one that caused the fail that I did? Because you didn't watch out for the cord See? That's what you get Unbiased opinion Singing a song about my past Um, destruction What? What? What? Anyways I don't even know if anybody can hear this So I'm gonna kick it back and like Call this one in Um, but I have to do more of these Um, I'm gonna have to look back at the quality of it Before I caught you, you know what I'm saying? And see what's up Anyways No one came There was one person that came And he was like Dave Beddington He was like, what's up dog? Dave Beddington Oh no, it's a dude Alright, later
